languages.text: {n}Ювенна беспомощно озирается по сторонам. Ее кулаки сжаты с такой силой, что с изящных кистей падают мелкие капли крови.{/n} "Врата... закрыты. Бесполезно. Все это бесполезно". {n}Она замирает, низко склонив голову. Момент упущен. Униженная наследница вряд ли пойдет на более решительные действия.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ювенна беспомощно озирается по сторонам. Ее кулаки сжаты с такой силой, что с изящных кистей падают мелкие капли крови.{/n} "Врата... закрыты. Бесполезно. Все это бесполезно". {n}Она замирает, низко склонив голову. Момент упущен. Униженная наследница вряд ли пойдет на более решительные действия.{/n}
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

languages.text: {n}尤文娜无助地环顾四周。她的拳头攥得如此之紧，细小的血滴从她纤细的手上滑落。{/n}“城门……关上了。没用了。一切都毫无意义……”{n}她垂下头，整个人僵立不动。时机已然错过，这位受辱的继承人，怕是再也做不出什么果决的举动了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜无助地环顾四周。她的拳头攥得如此之紧，细小的血滴从她纤细的手上滑落。{/n}“城门……关上了。没用了。一切都毫无意义……”{n}她垂下头，整个人僵立不动。时机已然错过，这位受辱的继承人，怕是再也做不出什么果决的举动了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Juvenna regarde autour d'elle, l'air impuissant. Elle serre les poings si fermement que des gouttelettes de sang s'échappent de ses mains délicates.{/n} « Les portes... sont fermées. C'est inutile. Tout cela ne sert à rien. » {n}Elle s'immobilise, tête baissée. Le moment est passé. L'héritière humiliée ne risque plus de faire preuve d'initiative.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

Tout cela ne sert à rien. » {n}Elle s'immobilise, tête baissée. Le moment est passé. L'héritière humiliée ne risque plus de faire preuve d'initiative.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Juvenna mira impotente a su alrededor. Aprieta los puños con fuerza suficiente como para hacer que sus delicadas manos sangren.{/n} «Las puertas... están cerradas. Es inútil. No tiene sentido». {n}Queda inmóvil con la cabeza gacha. El momento ha pasado. La heredera, humillada, no tomará otra acción decisiva.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

No tiene sentido». {n}Queda inmóvil con la cabeza gacha. El momento ha pasado. La heredera, humillada, no tomará otra acción decisiva.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Juvenna çaresizce etrafına bakınıyor. Yumrukları o kadar güçlü sıkılmış ki narin ellerinden küçük kan damlaları düşüyor.{/n} "Kapılar... Kapalı. Faydası yok. Hepsi anlamsız." {n}Sessizleşip başını öne eğiyor. Zaman geçiyor. Aşağılanmış vârisin daha kararlı bir adım atması pek olası değil.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

Hepsi anlamsız." {n}Sessizleşip başını öne eğiyor. Zaman geçiyor. Aşağılanmış vârisin daha kararlı bir adım atması pek olası değil.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Juvenna sieht sich hilflos um. Sie ballt ihre Fäuste mit einer solchen Kraft, dass sich an ihren zierlichen Händen winzige Blutstropfen bilden.{/n} "Die Tore ... sind geschlossen. Es nützt nichts. Es ist alles sinnlos." {n}Sie verstummt und senkt den Kopf. Der Augenblick ist vorüber. Die gedemütigte Erbin wird wohl nichts mehr unternehmen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

Es ist alles sinnlos." {n}Sie verstummt und senkt den Kopf. Der Augenblick ist vorüber. Die gedemütigte Erbin wird wohl nichts mehr unternehmen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは絶望の表情で周囲を見渡す。握りしめた拳から小さな血滴が彼女の繊細な手に落ちる。{/n}「門は閉ざされている。無駄だ。全て無駄だ。」{n}彼女は静まり、頭を垂れる。その瞬間は過ぎた。屈辱を受けた彼女は、もはや決断的な行動は取らないだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna looks around helplessly. Her fists are clenched with such force that small drops of blood fall from her delicate hands.{/n} "The gates... are shut. It's no use. It's all pointless." {n}She goes still, bowing her head low. The moment has passed. The humiliated heir is unlikely to take more decisive action.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ジュベナは絶望の表情で周囲を見渡す。握りしめた拳から小さな血滴が彼女の繊細な手に落ちる。{/n}「門は閉ざされている。無駄だ。全て無駄だ。」{n}彼女は静まり、頭を垂れる。その瞬間は過ぎた。屈辱を受けた彼女は、もはや決断的な行動は取らないだろう。{/n}
